name: Apple Cheese Tart
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Butter (COLD), cut into small pieces
1 cup Tillamook cheese; or cheddar, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the apples.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, 3 tablespoons sugar, and cinnamon.
3. Add the cold butter to the flour mixture. Mix until it resembles fine bread crumbs.
4. Stir in the egg yolks and ice water. Mix until the dough forms almost into a ball.
5. Press the dough onto the bottom and up the sides of a 10-inch tart pan.
6. Chill for 30 minutes, or prepare the dough in a food processor.
7. Sprinkle cheese and nuts evenly over the pastry shell.
8. Arrange apple slices over the mixture.
9. Sprinkle with lemon peel and remaining 4 tablespoons sugar.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for another 20 to 25 minutes.
11. Serve warm with slices of Tillamook or Cheddar cheese. Serves 6.
